symptom: Eight concurrent lanes rejected verified registry projections while one lane accepted the same contract and only that lane reached the provider.
rootCauseContract: Both live-proof and live execution must consume the host-verified adapter projection; live incorrectly reloaded the stale registry from the immutable source snapshot.

correction.modelAndAdapterProjection: exact Docker environment argv consumed by both live modes

regressionAssertion: All nine lanes must report verified identity, the same task digest, and concurrent start/end intervals before ranking is allowed.
